headline: Seagate (STX) Stock Falls As AI Storage Oversupply Fears Rattle Sentiment
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (NasdaqGS:STX) shares dropped sharply as concerns grow about a potential oversupply in AI focused memory and data storage. Sector wide worries center on increased capacity from major storage competitors and signs that AI capital spending may be leveling off. Investors are reassessing demand expectations and pricing power across the storage supply chain as risk of a supply glut builds. For Seagate Technology Holdings, the pullback comes after a period of very...

headline: AI Memory and Storage Glut Fears Loom as SanDisk, Micron, Seagate All Plunge
summary: SanDisk sinks 14%, Micron falls 5%, and Seagate drops 10% as investors price in a looming AI memory and storage supply glut.

raw.headline: AI Memory and Storage Glut Fears Loom as SanDisk, Micron, Seagate All Plunge

headline: Seagate, Kulicke and Soffa, and Lam Research Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the semiconductor sector pulled back amid fears that AI-driven chip demand may be cooling.
